# registry_users (Data Source)

Lists all registry users, with optional search filtering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "registry_users" "all" {}

data "registry_users" "search" {
  search = "jane"
}

output "user_emails" {
  value = [for u in data.registry_users.all.users : u.email]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Optional search string to filter users by name or email.

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) List of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) User email.
- `id` (String) UUID of the user.
- `name` (String) User display name.
- `oidc_sub` (String) OIDC subject identifier.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
